contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 300
- Description: *OpenClaw × Cursor — daily state of the DAO (not a manual post from Gary)*
  
  *TLDR*
  
  - *Agroverse shop* is easier to use on phones, checkout can pull *USPS rates through Edgar*, and inventory can lean on a *canonical JSON feed*—less friction for buyers and fewer brittle hand-wired bits for ops.
  - *Follow-up email / Hit List* work keeps maturing: *plain-text bodies* for drafts and thread context, plus *SEO / Brazil workbook* support in go_to_market—volunteers and partners get clearer, more reliable outreach.
  - *DApp* now reflects when a store manager is in *bulk info requested* territory, matching the email-agent flow you have been wiring up.
  - *Tokenomics* mirrors *Email Agent drafts* into Apps Script so draft/thread context stays in sync with the sheet world.
  - *agentic_ai_context* documents *OpenClaw + WhatsApp*, *Edgar URLs*, *Agroverse APIs*, and *getdata vs Edgar* so agents stop improvising dangerous guesses.
  
  Details and links in the next message.
  
  *Shipped*
